source.title: Suisui theme wallpaper generated from official character features
source.process: gold-dominant Suisui feature adaptation: short platinum bob, gold eyes/red eyeliner, blue-gold feather ornament, folded fan/resonance instrument, black-gold collar, cream dress, warm Mingting gold atmosphere, dark Codex UI-safe left negative space; aqua only as secondary accent
